He was diagnosed with a respiratory tract infection, an anesthesiologist, analgesia, and antibiotics were commenced. His crime medications are currently awaiting from pharmacy. A full skin assessment was carried out, and returned with no issues observed. Addressing remains in situ on the left forehead. He is on neurological observation as per protocol. G.P. was informed via mail that John had been transferred back from the hospital.
